2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

532 BUMK - Marketing

BULM756 Supply Chain Strategy (2 Credits)

Examines supply chain management at the strategic level. Through

class lectures, case discussions, and assignments, students first learn about the determinants of corporate strategy. Supply chain strategies

are then discussed, along with the need to properly align supply chain strategy with corporate strategy. Finally, there is a discussion of how to implement supply chain strategy, given various environmental and market considerations.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BULM758B or BULM756.
